raw_title: Customize Amazon Nova models with Amazon Bedrock fine-tuning
raw_content: In this post, we'll walk you through a complete implementation of model fine-tuning in Amazon Bedrock using Amazon Nova models, demonstrating each step through an intent classifier example that achieves superior performance on a domain specific task. Throughout this guide, you'll learn to prepare high-quality training data that drives meaningful model improvements, configure hyperparameters to optimize learning without overfitting, and deploy your fine-tuned model for improved accuracy and reduced latency. We'll show you how to evaluate your results using training metrics and loss curves.
